name: Missed Call Text-Back — Pressure Washing
description: Missed-call text-back automation for local service businesses. IDs replaced with placeholders for public sharing — the real workflow runs on a private n8n instance with real GHL account IDs.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ locationId: "<GHL_LOCATION_ID>", phone: $('Dedup Check').item.json.phone, tags: ["missed-call-lead"], source: "missed-call-textback" }) }}

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Hey, this is [Business Name] — sorry we missed your call! Reply here or call us back and we'll get you a quote. Reply STOP to opt out.

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Hey, sorry we missed you! What do you need — we'll get right back to you.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ locationId: "<GHL_LOCATION_ID>", pipelineId: "<GHL_PIPELINE_ID>", pipelineStageId: "<GHL_STAGE_ID>", name: "Missed Call - " + $('Mark Texted (Update Dedup Store)').item.json.phone, status: "open", contactId: $('Mark Texted (Update Dedup Store)').item.json.contactId }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
console.log('Pipeline stage update failed (non-fatal - SMS already sent):', JSON.stringify($json));
return [{ json: { ...$json, pipelineUpdateFailed: true } }];
